description_long: This hammer features a large, barrel-shaped wooden head with pronounced wood grain texture and reinforced by two wide, blue metal bands adorned with yellow star-shaped rivets. The head has a central spout or nozzle on top, suggesting a whimsical or fantasy-inspired design, and a cross-shaped metallic fixture on one side. The handle is relatively short, cylindrical, and wrapped with colored bands, giving it a secure grip and decorative flair. The ends of the hammer head are capped with circular wooden faces, each displaying detailed wood grain and ring patterns. The overall appearance is robust and stylized, with a blend of functional and ornamental elements, making it stand out in an urban or fantasy setting.
description: A stylized hammer with a large, barrel-like wooden head reinforced by blue metal bands and a short, decorated handle. The design is robust, whimsical, and highly detailed.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel head with a central spout, blue metal bands, yellow rivets, and a cross-shaped fixture.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the circular wooden end of the barrel head and the colored bands on the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite side of the barrel head, with similar metal bands and rivets but without the cross-shaped fixture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other circular wooden end, with visible wood grain and ring patterns.
attribute_handle_type: Short, cylindrical wooden handle wrapped with colored bands for grip enhancement; straight and textured.
attribute_head_type: Large, barrel-shaped wooden head reinforced with blue metal bands and yellow rivets; features a central spout and a cross-shaped metallic fixture.
